name: Open-Meteo Weather Forecast
description: Location-based weather forecast layer for temperature and precipitation context sourced from Open-Meteo.

metadata.label: Open-Meteo Weather Forecast
metadata.constraints: Useful for forecast context. Validate non-commercial limits and attribution requirements.
metadata.human_summary: Forecast-oriented weather overlay for location-specific temperature and precipitation context.
search_examples: display rain outlook for Rome tonight
disambiguation_notes: Use this when users ask for weather evolution over time rather than static satellite imagery.
integration_requirements: No API key required in the free Open-Meteo flow
